en.extract:
Stierling's wren-warbler (Calamonastes stierlingi), is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae found in southern Africa.   It is sometimes considered a subspecies of the miombo wren-warbler.


References


External links

'''Stierling's wren-warbler''' ('''''Calamonastes stierlingi'''''), is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Cisticolidae]] found in southern Africa.   It is sometimes considered a subspecies of the [[miombo wren-warbler]].
